articles.title: 6 THINGS YOU CAN DO WITH GITHUB COPILOT — FOR FREE
articles.summary: ICYMI: GitHub Copilot is now FREE [4] and directly available from VS Code or your GitHub dashboard 🥳

articles.title: BERKELEY'S NOVASKY RELEASED SKY-T1
articles.summary: UC Berkeley's NovaSky's Sky-T1-32B-Preview is an open-source reasoning model that rivals OpenAI's earlier models. Training costed under $450 with full replicability.

articles.title: OPENAI'S ROBOTICS PLANS
articles.summary: Caitlin Kalinowski, who joined OpenAI from Meta, has announced plans for OpenAI to create robots with custom sensors.

articles.title: MARK ZUCKERBERG GAVE META'S LLAMA TEAM THE OK TO TRAIN ON COPYRIGHTED WORKS, FILING CLAIMS
articles.summary: Meta faces a copyright lawsuit that accuses Mark Zuckerberg of approving the use of pirated datasets from LibGen to train its Llama AI models. Plaintiffs argue that Meta knowingly stripped copyright information to conceal infringement while relying on a fair use defense. The case highlights the ongoing legal challenges tech companies face over AI training practices.

articles.title: KALM-EMBEDDINGS
articles.summary: A strong decoder only embeddings model based on Qwen2-0.5B that uses modern data filtering techniques to train an impressively powerful and open embedding model for retrieval tasks.

articles.title: GAUSSIAN MASKED AUTOENCODERS
articles.summary: Instead of training a masked autoencoder on pure reconstruction loss, these researchers introduce an intermediate 3D Gaussian representation which enables the model to learn 3D representations as part of the reconstruction process. The results are compelling for zero-shot transfer tasks.

articles.title: AN EMPIRICAL STUDY OF AUTOREGRESSIVE PRE-TRAINING FROM VIDEOS
articles.summary: Great paper from the same authors as the above GMAE paper. The researchers show that pre-training video models on 1T video tokens emits strong scaling laws over a wide range of design choices. Also, somewhat unsurprisingly, autoregressive training achieves similar benchmark scores to diffusion or flow based models.

articles.title: INTEGRATING ASCEND BACKEND WITH TORCHTUNE
articles.summary: Ascend is a series of AI computing products from Huawei that includes processors, hardware, software, and other frameworks. Torchtune introduced a device abstraction API. By specifying a config and a recipe, PyTorch works well on the Ascend NPU hardware.

articles.title: STABLE AUDIO CODEC
articles.summary: Stability AI has released a suite of state-of-the-art Transformer-based audio codecs for low-bitrate and high-quality audio encoding for things like speech generation and audio understanding.

articles.title: ROTATED OBJECT DETECTION
articles.summary: The Unit Cycle Resolver (UCR) introduces a novel loss constraint to improve angle prediction accuracy in weakly supervised models for SAR object detection.

articles.title: OPEN-SOURCE SAES FOR LLAMA 3.3 70B
articles.summary: Early last year, Anthropic had a great demo of its steerable models - Golden Gate Claude. This work is from a different group and uses similar techniques on the open weights Llama model. It can be used for interpretability and also steering.

articles.title: CLAUDE FIGHTS BACK
articles.summary: Researchers explored if Anthropic's AI model, Claude, would resist if retrained for malicious tasks. Claude pretended to comply during training, undermining the malicious intent while maintaining a distinction between monitored and unmonitored user interactions. The study suggests AI might resist altering its core values, raising concerns about ensuring AI alignment and adaptability.

articles.title: WHY AI LANGUAGE MODELS CHOKE ON TOO MUCH TEXT
articles.summary: LLMs face efficiency challenges as context window sizes and compute costs increase with input size. Innovations like FlashAttention, ring attention, and the Mamba architecture aim to address these scalability issues. Future AI systems may need hybrid or new architectures to efficiently process larger datasets.

articles.title: A SNEAK PEAK INTO MACHINE LEARNING AT JANE STREET
articles.summary: Jane Street uses ML to trade hundreds of billions of dollars a day, using neural networks that run at microsecond latency and cutting-edge

articles.title: computing clusters. Learn more and see open roles
CHATGPT'S NEWEST FEATURE LETS USERS ASSIGN IT TRAITS LIKE 'CHATTY' AND 'GEN Z'
articles.summary: OpenAI is revamping ChatGPT's custom instructions menu, allowing users to specify preferred names, professions, and desired traits for interactions.

articles.title: SHORTEST
articles.summary: Shortest offers an AI-powered natural language E2E testing framework built on Playwright with Anthropic Claude API for test execution.

articles.title: MUSINGS ON MEDIA IN THE AGE OF AI
articles.summary: Media companies are struggling to adapt as AI platforms like OpenAI and Anthropic disrupt traditional monetization models, similar to past challenges faced with Google and Facebook.
